description: This section presents the ESCO® colorants offered by SOYUZSNAB Group for beverage applications. The comprehensive colorant portfolio is divided into three key categories: natural colorants, powdered synthetic colorants, and liquid synthetic colorants. The natural colorants section features caramel colorants (E150D, HS, SOFT, and blended variants) that provide stable coloring, safety, and compatibility with various ingredients and production conditions. The powdered synthetic colorants category includes Green Apple (E102, E133), Carmoisine E122, Ponceau 4R E124, Chocolate Brown (E102, E110, E122, E133), and Tartrazine E102, offering vibrant colors, technological stability, and ease of use. The liquid synthetic colorants section presents Green Apple, Forest Blueberry, Orange, Juicy Strawberry, Altai Cherry, Blue B, emulsion Beta-carotene 0.5%, Sunny Lemon, and Black Currant, which feature standardized concentrations and application convenience. All ESCO® colorants ensure high color stability, resistance to technological processing, and simplified production processes for various beverage categories including non-alcoholic, juice-containing, functional, energy, and alcoholic products.

natural_colorants.description: This section details ESCO® natural colorants, with particular focus on caramel-based solutions for beverage applications. The range includes Caramel E150D, Caramel LC, Caramel HS, Caramel SOFT, and Blended Caramel E150A. These natural colorants provide exceptional coloring stability, safety assurance through natural origin, compatibility with various ingredients, and adaptability to different production conditions. The products help standardize the visual appearance of beverages while maintaining a natural ingredient profile. ESCO® caramel colorants are widely used across multiple beverage categories, delivering reliable performance during processing and consistent results in the final product.

synthetic_powder_colorants.description: This section covers ESCO® powdered synthetic colorants, which are distinguished by their vibrant color intensity, technological resilience, and application simplicity. The product range includes Green Apple colorant (combination of E102 and E133), Carmoisine E122, Ponceau 4R E124, Chocolate Brown colorant (blend of E102, E110, E122, and E133), and Tartrazine E102. These powdered colorants offer significant advantages in storage stability and precise dosing capabilities. The products deliver highly saturated colors while remaining economically efficient in application rates. ESCO® powdered synthetic colorants are specifically formulated to achieve diverse color profiles from green, crimson, orange, red, golden-yellow, dark brown, and gray to dark gray hues, making them ideal for various beverage applications requiring distinctive visual appeal.

synthetic_liquid_colorants.description: This section examines ESCO® liquid synthetic colorants, which offer exceptional convenience, standardized concentration levels, and a diverse palette of color options. The portfolio includes Green Apple, Forest Blueberry, Orange, Juicy Strawberry, Altai Cherry, Blue B, emulsion-based Beta-carotene 0.5%, Sunny Lemon, and Black Currant. These liquid formulations minimize production losses through their dust-free application and precise dispensing capabilities. The standardized concentration ensures consistent results across production batches, while simplifying technological processes for manufacturers. ESCO® liquid colorants are extensively used across numerous beverage categories including non-alcoholic, juice-containing, and alcoholic products. The liquid format provides significant handling advantages over powder alternatives, with reduced contamination risk and improved mixing properties in beverage systems.
